name: Goods Triple Sort
description: Step into Goods Master: Triple Sort and turn chaos into perfect order! Sort a messy mix of everyday items like milk, cola, and cakes by grouping identical products together. Clear the shelves, plan your moves, and enjoy a satisfying puzzle experience that’s easy to learn but challenging to master. With smooth gameplay and engaging levels, every match brings you closer to becoming the ultimate sorting master.
instructions: Mouse Touch Tap or click to select items Drag amp Drop Move items to match 3 identical products Release Place items in the correct spot to clear them
